transcript:
Speaker A: Hello, what is your name?
Speaker B: My name is Rahul.
Speaker A: How old are you?
Speaker B: I have 22.
Speaker A: "I have 22" nahi, "I am 22 years old" hota hai. [Not "I have 22", it is "I am 22 years old".]
Speaker B: Okay okay, I am 22 years old.
Speaker A: Where are you from?
Speaker B: I am Uttar Pradesh.
Speaker A: "I am Uttar Pradesh" nahi, "I am from Uttar Pradesh" hoga. [Not "I am Uttar Pradesh", it will be "I am from Uttar Pradesh".]
Speaker B: Oh theek hai, theek hai. Mujhe English acche se nahi aati. [Oh okay, okay. I don't know English very well.]
Speaker A: Koi problem nahi. AI teachers try kiya? [No problem. Did you try AI teachers?]
Speaker B: Wo to mehnge hote honge na? [They must be expensive, right?]
Speaker A: Bilkul nahi. Normal English classes se 7x cheaper hai. Isliye 50 lakh log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all. It is 7x cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.]
Speaker B: Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.]
Speaker A: Roz ki sirf 15-20 minute ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaogi. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.]
Speaker B: Wow, kaise join karu? [Wow, how do I join?]
Speaker A: Ye install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sirf 15 dino mein tumhe improvement dikhne lagegi. Chalo, shuru ho jao. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, get started.]
Speaker C: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]

summary: The ad features a split-screen video call where an AI robot corrects a young Indian man's English grammar in real-time. It highlights that the MySivi app is 7x cheaper than traditional classes and requires only 15-20 minutes of daily practice. The call to action prompts users to install the app to improve their English fluency.
